clips.title: The Puddle
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, moody grade. A rain-slicked city street at night, a large puddle mirroring glowing neon signs above. A reflection shot: the frame centers on the puddle's mirror image of a person standing above it, their reflection sharp in the water amid the neon. A person in a coat. Cool neon reflections, wet sheen, 35mm, reflection shot. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Mirror
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, intimate grade. A dim room with an ornate wall mirror, warm lamp nearby. A reflection shot: the frame is composed on the mirror, showing a person's reflection sharply as they stand before it, the real person partly out of frame. A person in elegant attire. Warm lamplight, soft reflection, 50mm, reflection shot. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: Still Water
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, serene grade. A perfectly still mountain lake at dawn, mirror-flat water reflecting the peaks and sky. A reflection shot: the frame centers on the water's mirror image of a person standing at the shore, their reflection crisp on the surface. A person in a warm coat. Soft dawn light, glassy reflection, 35mm, reflection shot. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Glass
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, sleek grade. A modern skyscraper window at dusk, the glass reflecting the person while the city glows through it. A reflection shot: the frame captures a person's reflection in the floor-to-ceiling glass, overlaid on the city lights beyond. A person in business attire. Cool glass reflection, city bokeh, 50mm, reflection shot. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Mirror Wall
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, stylish grade. A dance studio with a full mirrored wall, pale wood floor, soft light. A reflection shot: the frame is composed on the mirror wall, showing a person's reflection sharply as they hold a pose, doubling the space. A person in dancewear. Soft daylight, clean reflection, 35mm, reflection shot. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Sunglasses
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, crisp grade. A bright sunny street, vivid and colorful. A reflection shot: a tight frame on a person's mirrored sunglasses, the sunlit street scene reflected clearly in the lenses, the person's face around them. A person in summer style with reflective sunglasses. Bright warm light, sharp lens reflection, 85mm, reflection shot. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.
